settings.title: Pamitik

engines.chiptune3Desc: Suporta 20+ formatu tracker (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Mibalik king FFmpeg para kareng aliwang formatu.
engines.bassoonDesc: Suporti mu .xm / .mod. Mibalik king Chiptune3 atin FFmpeg para kareng aliwang format.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Gawing MP3 deng kareng audio format. Maragul a suporta, mabagal a pamagumpisa.

settings.engineDesc: Piliin nung audio engine a gamitan. Rekomendado ing Chiptune3 para king mas masanting a suporta king tracker format.

tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Ing pindutan ning mode normal a magpalto mu namang icon — ing pamag-click magpalto kareng apat a playback mode

intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Live Visualization — Panlawang Pattern at Oscilloscope
intro.tutorialTitle: Pamanggit king Pamangamit ning Tracker Player
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Gawang libreng account para ma-unlock ing karagdagang feature:
intro.tutorialClosing: Masanting pamikil — at pakibandya ing musika!
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Ing Tracker Player darag yang musika king bie na king adwang complementary real-time visualizations:
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Ing Tracker Player malyaring i-customize. Puntalan me ing settings kapamilatan ning gear icon (top bar) o ing Settings ear (left sidebar):
intro.introWelcome: Ing pintuang papunta sa pamamahala ng tracker music sa 68+ na format — mula sa maalamat na MOD at XM hanggang sa modernong MPTM at UMX — na hango sa malawak na koleksyon sa
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Matalik a tip: King mobile, idagdag ya ing Tracker Player king home screen mu para king karanasan a anti king native app. Masanting yang magobra bilang Progressive Web App a maki offline caching.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Ing playlist ing puso ning Tracker Player. Gamitin ing search bar king babo para makapaghanap kareng track kapamilatan ning filename o title. Lalam ning search bar, atin kang makapangyarihang set ning filters:
intro.tutorialLead: Ing gabay na ini gagamit keka king balang feature ning Tracker Player, manibat king pamag-umpisa kang maghanap ning mumuna mung track angga king pamag-customize ning player para king workflow mu.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player metung yang player — metung yang kumpletung tracker music platform a maki magandang interface, responsive, real-time pattern visualization, per-channel oscilloscopes, at maraming kasangkapan a dinisenyu para gawing madali at kasiyasiya ing pamag-diskubre at pamag-enjoy king tracked music king anumang device.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Pindutin ing aliwang track king playlist para simulan ing pamamyal. Ing player maglo-load agad — keraklan kareng file magumpisa lang mag-play king lalam ning metung a segundu. Kabang mag-play ing track, akit mu la:
intro.introWhatBody3: Mula king pamag-search at pamag-filter kareng playlist, audio visualization, sistema ning user account, hanggang king suporta king internationalization, ing Tracker Player migtinduk ne ing kumpletung ecosystem kareng peripheral features king paligid ning player core, a pakay na ing papamasa kareng user king kakaibang charm ning tracker music nung e la atin anumang technical background.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , metung a browser-based Amiga MOD/XM tracker a sinulat king pure JavaScript nang Steffest, a matapat a ginagawa ing klasikung tracker playback experience. King pundasyun a iti, ing proyektu ay mig-integrate nang Chiptune3 (metung a custom WebAssembly engine a mibasi king libopenmpt) at FFmpeg server-side transcoding, a pinalawak ing format support manibat king orihinal a MOD/XM angga sa mahigit 68 format.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Anggang araw ini, ing tracker music magpapatuloy yang magtagumpay king global demoscene community at kareng retro computing enthusiasts. Ing Tracker Player maglalayun yang ipakilala kareng dakal pang tau ing metung a kakaibang anyo ning sining a iti a magdala king kasalesayan ning computer music, kapamilatan ning modernung interface at maginhawang interaksyon.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player metung yang open-source personal a proyektung dedikadu king pamagdala ning kasiyahan ning tracker music king modernung browser. E ya bagung audio engine, nun e mas malalam a integrasyon at sekundaryung development a mitatag kareng eksistienting magaling a open-source projects, a gagawang kumpletung sistema ning karanasan ning gagamit.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Ing balang track king Tracker Player atin yang permanenting, malyaring pabahagi a URL. Kopyahin ing link manibatan king address bar ning browser mu kabang maglalaro ing track — magmukla yang /song/123456/filename.mod. Ipakit kareng kaluguran, ipaskil king social media, o i-bookmark para king kayari. Ing link palagi nang bubuksan ing pareung track.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Ing tracker music (a misan yang module music o MOD music) metung yang kakaibang anyu ning digital music a mebulus anyang tauling dake ning 1980s king Commodore Amiga. E katulad ning MP3 o streaming audio, ing tracker files atin lang musical score (notes, patterns, effects) at deng instrument samples — anti yang sarili nang music project file. Ini papayagan nang tracker files a masikan a compact kabang papayagan na ing makapagmulalang musical complexity.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Ing progresibung JavaScript framework a gagamit para king component-based UI mi. Ing Composition API ning Vue, reactivity system, at single-file components migawa lang posible a magtayo at magmantini king complex player interface a maki malinis at modular a code.
intro.changelogIntro: Ing Tracker Player mekapilan nang maragul manibat king kayang pamagumpisa bilang simpling MOD/XM player. Ngeni, iti ing talaan da ring manimunang milagro:
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: Ing API ning graphics ning browser a mag-render keng real-time tracker pattern view. Ing pattern note data ay i-stream king WebGL canvas king 60 fps, a matapat a mag-reproduce king scrolling-note a itsura da reng classic tracker editors anti ing ProTracker at FastTracker II.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Ing Vue.js meta-framework a magsilbi king kabilugan a frontend at backend mi. Ing Nuxt magsilbi yang server-side rendering para king mabilis a pamag-load page at SEO, Nitro server para king API routes, SQLite database integration, at automatic code-splitting para king optimal performance.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Ing LLVM-based compiler toolchain a mag-compile keng C/C++ code papunta king WebAssembly. Magamit kami king Emscripten para i-compile ing aming patched libopenmpt — kayabe ya ing custom waveform_processor — papunta king single-file WASM module a mag-execute king near-native speed kilub ning AudioWorklet ning browser.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player mitatag ya king makapangilag a open-source ecosystem. Ing kabilugan ming 135,400+ track library ibat ya king The Mod Archive — ing tiyak a repositoryu ning internet para king tracker music. Maragul ming pasalamat king balang contributor a obra na migawa ing proyektung iti posible.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Ing pangunahing repositoryo ning internet para king tracked music, a maki 150,000 a modules manibat kareng libu-libung artista king apat a dekada. Ing Mod Archive ya ing bukud tang pibandian ning musika king aming library at metung a alang kapalitan a institusyon para king tracking community.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Ing CSS framework a pang-utility-first a magagamit para king pamanakit. Ing sistema ning design token ning Tailwind ing papagana king keng 16-theme a arkitektura — balang kule, anino, at borden a makibagay king aktibung tema kapamilatan da reng CSS custom properties a melalang ibat king keng Tailwind configuration.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Gawa nang Steffest. Metung a matapat a browser-based reimplementation da reng classic Amiga MOD at XM tracker — ProTracker at FastTracker II — a sinulat a mabilug king JavaScript. Ing BassoonTracker magbigya yang authentic at mainit a playback a migumpisa king proyektung ini, a mayayagumang suporta para kareng classic 4-channel MOD at multi-channel XM a kayabe la reng envelopes, filters, at effects.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Ing W3C Web Audio API a espesipikasiun a magpapagana king mababa-latency, alang-glitch a pamagproseso king audio king metung a dedikadung real-time thread. Ing AudioWorklet iya pin ing lugal nung nu ing Chiptune3 engine magpatakbo king compiled libopenmpt WASM, timawa king manimunang UI thread, a sisiguradu king makinis a pamag-playback alang malyari king actividad ning interface.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Gawa nang DrSnuggles — metung a open-source JavaScript library a mamilikid king libopenmpt king metung a AudioWorklet para king browser playback da reng 68+ tracker formats. Para king proyektung iti, minodify tamu ing AudioWorklet processor para maging extract ing per-channel waveform data (para king multi-channel oscilloscopes), migdagdag kaming automatic gain control, at pinalakas mi ing race-condition handling para king mabilis a track switching. Ing Chiptune3 ing magsilbing tulay king pagitan ning browser's Web Audio API at ning decoding power ning aming patched libopenmpt build, at iti ing aming recommended default engine.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Ing format a pinangunahan nang Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker anyang 1987, at mabilis yang mebago king pamamagitan ning demoscene — metung a masiglang subkultura nung nu la maglaban deng programmer, musikero, at artista para gumawang makapagmulang audiovisual a obra. King pilan nang dekada, dakal a tracker format a mebalu, balang metung magtutulak king batalan ning posible: mas dakal a channel, mas masanting a epektu, synthesized a instrumentu, suporta king VST plugin, at pati kumpletung kakayahan king pamamix. Ngéni, aktibu pa ing tracker scene king mabilug a yatu, at atin bayung musikang lulual balang aldo kareng site anti king The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Mekad ya OpenMPT contributors. Ing tiyak a open-source tracker playback library, susuporta kareng 68+ module format a maki alang kapantay a katumpakan. Inyalilan mi ing C source code ning libopenmpt — dinagdagan mi ing sarili ming waveform_processor a sumasalo kareng per-channel PCM data king lalam ning mixer bayu ing pinal a output — at in-compile mi ya king WebAssembly kapamilatan ning Emscripten. Ing aming patched WASM build ing pinalitan ya ing upstream pre-compiled binary a kasama ning Chiptune3, a papagana kareng per-channel oscilloscopes at magsilbi yang decoding backbone para kareng eganaganang 68+ format.
tutorialStep1Filters: Format Filter — Pindutin para buksan ang multi-select grid ning eganaganang format a maliari. Gamitin deng preset button para mabilis mamili kareng grupo: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Eganagana (56 format), o Eganaganang Suportaran.
Sala ning Channel — Paliitan ya agpang king bilang ning channel: 4 a channel (klasikung MOD era), 8 a channel, o 8+ a channel (modernung multitrack).
Sukat a Filter — Salain king sukad ning file: malati (<100KB), kalagitnaan, o maragul (>1MB).
Pamagal ning Tracker Name — Mag-type lagyu ning tracker (alimbawa, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") bang mayakit ing musikang ginawa king partikular a software.
Pamilian a Pag-ayos — Ayusin ing playlist kapamilatan ning ID, titulu, lagyu ning file, dagul, o petsa ning pamagbayu, king pamanik o pamibaba.
Pamiliang Pinagmulan — Lumipat sa pagitan ng Lahat ng track, iyong Mga Paborito, at iyong Kasaysayan ng Pag-play.
tutorialStep2Details: Impormasyun ning Track — Titulu, artista, format, bilang da reng channel, at numeru ning track a makapakit king babo da reng kontrol ning player.

Play/Pause & Navigation — Maragul a button para king Play/Pause a maki pamiling playback mode: Shuffle (aliurut), In Order (sunod-sunod), Loop One (ulit-ulitin ing metung), o Stop After Current (tigilan kaibat ning kasalukuyan).
Susunod a Track — Laktawan king susunod a track a manual, o paburen ing kekang piniling playback mode a manibala kaniti.
Volume at Progress — Ayusin ing volume kapamilatan ning slider, mag-seek king track, at akit ing panaun a milipas/nalalabi.
Buton ning Like — Pindutan ing pusu bang magdagdag ning track kareng paboritu mu (mangailangan yang account).
Download — I-save ing orihinal a tracker file king kekang device.
Link ning ModArchive — Buka ing pahina ning track king The Mod Archive para king mas dakal a kontekstu at komentaryu ning komunidad.

Track Info Modal — Lon ya detalyadung metadata: lagyu ning tracker, petsa, tagal, uri ning container, subsongs, bilang ning channel, instrumentu, samples, orders, patterns, at aliwang embedded a mensahe ibat king composer.
tutorialStep3Details: Pattern View — Lawan ing aktuwal a pattern data ning tracker a mag-scroll king real time, render keng WebGL para king makinis a performance. Ing balang column ay kumakatawan king metung a channel, ing balang row ay metung a note event. Deng notes, instrumentu, volume, at effect commands ay makikita la ngan — anti mu naman king classic tracker editor. Pindutan ing pattern toggle para magpalipat king vertical (tradisyonal) at horizontal (widescreen) a layout.

Per-Channel Oscilloscopes — King lalamas ning player, makatakit kang grid da reng waveform displays — metung para king balang audio channel king track. Deti makapagana la king miyayang C-level waveform processor a makabukud king libopenmpt, a mang-extract kareng indibidwal a channel audio bayu ing final mixing. Panooran me ing waveform ning balang channel a mag-scroll king real time, a magbigyang visual fingerprint nung makananu ing musikang ginawa — kick drum king channel 1, bass king channel 2, lead king channel 3, at aliwa pa.
Deng dalawang visualisasyon ay maaaring i-toggle on/off king Settings para king performance o kagustuhan.
tutorialStep4Settings: Playback Engine — Piliin king pamanateng BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (recommended, 20+ formatu), o FFmpeg (peka maragul a formatu suporta kapamilatan ning server-side conversion).

Tema — Pili king 16 a kuleang tema. Deng maputing tema ilapin ing Light, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, at Gray. Deng maitim a tema ilapin ing Dark, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, at Green.
Pamialita — 52 a pamialita ning interface. Ing kekang pamili misimpan ya king lokal.
Volume — Magtakda ning default a volume level at optional a pilitan ya king balang track.
Normalisasyun ning Loudness — Awtomatikung i-adjust ing playback volume para king consistent a pakikinig (default a naka-on).
Maksimum Bilang ning Loop — Deng kanta king Tracker keraklan mag-loop la naman. Mag-set ka ning maksimum a bilang ning loop para iwasan ing e mapupud a pamikanta (default: 1).
Pamalda ning Display — Ipakita o itago ing scope visualization, pattern view, at introduction section.
tutorialStep5Details: Favorites — Pindalan ing kantang buri mu para isave ya king listan dang paboritu, a malyaring abalu ibat king pamamili ning pibandian ning playlist.
Kasaysayan ning Pamiplay — Ing balang track a pipamiplayan mu, awtomatiku yang marerekord. Siyasat ing kasaysayan mu bang makatuklas muring track.
Cross-Device Sync — Ing saru mong paborito at kasaysayan susundan kayo king karelang device nung mag-log in kayo.
Pribadidad — Ing account mu, maminu la reng paboritu at kasalesayan. Ala yang personal a data a makulekta o makabahagi.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Bibilioteka da reng 135,400+ tracker music files a sumasakup king 68+ format, manibat king 4-channel MODs angga king 256-channel epics.
Arkitekturang triple-engine: BassoonTracker (klasikong JS), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), at FFmpeg (server-side transcoding) — awtomatikong pipili para sa bawat file.
Pamuntuk real-time tracker pattern view a mi-render king WebGL — panooran la reng notes a mag-scroll anti king classic tracker editor.
Osciloskopyu ning waveform bawat channel — akit ing audio output ning balang channel bilang live a scrolling waveform, pinalakas ning custom C-level a pamag-extract ning waveform.
Disenyung responsibo a mababagong disenyo para king aliwang screen: desktop, tablet, o phone — kayabe ya ing horizontal pattern mode para king widescreen.
16 a mabulding pangkulay a tema — manibat king malinaw a maputi angga king malalam a kapitangangabi, solarized retro, mapali a gintu, at ding aliwapa.
52 a pamagsalita king interface — para maging madaling gamitan ing tracker music para kareng makinig king mabilug a yatu.
Masanting pamanintun, multi-pili format filter a maki preset button (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Egan Suportan), filter bilang channel, at multi-field sort.
Sistema ning account a maki paborito at kasaysayan ning pamamyal — i-sync la reng library mu king kareng eganaganang device mu.
Permanenteng pamamahaging kawing kanta — bawat track makakakuha ng natatanging URL arapat /song/123456/filename.mod.
I-download orihinal a tracker file o i-convert king MP3 kapamilatan ning metung a click.
Panel ning impormasyun ning track a magpalto ning metadata: titulu, artista, tracker, format, channel, instrumentu, sample, order, pattern, at mensaheng naka-embed.
Malyari yang libre, open-source, at pinapatakbo ning komunidad — alang ads, alang tracking, alang paywall.
